svg.title: Pipeline comparison: dangtr0408 StyleTTS2-lite-vi vs our Northern Vietnamese approach
svg.desc: Side-by-side comparison of their successful approach versus our current pipeline, with failure risk annotations

g.text: Token set never audited vs Kokoro ZH
Projects BERT CLS to mel mean only
Mel + dur + F0 val loss tracked
Best model gated by val loss
Smoke test: only checks loss direction
⚠ no early stopping or best-model gate
